repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md PartialID catalogue placeholder plus pid_dynamic_iv_compliance: finite partial-ID LP templates, not long-term surrogates

published_prior_art.cite: Manski1990: finite nonparametric bounds by optimizing over compatible latent structures
AtheyChettyImbensKang2019: surrogate-index ATE equals long-term ATE under Prentice-style surrogacy

repo_prior_art.cite: q1_partial_did_unobserved_trends and pid_dynamic_iv_compliance are adjacent but do not study noisy surrogate panels or post-surrogate drift

published_prior_art.cite: FanManzanaresParkQi2026 handles unknown-copula surrogate-index sets; HuangWangYuanZhaoZhang2026 handles longitudinal point extrapolation; neither subsumes noisy-panel drift tightening
ChenGengJia2007 and later surrogate-paradox work cover sign disagreement; the noisy-panel drift residual endpoint version is not subsumed

structure_flags.label: Bibliography
structure_flags.one_line: LiLuedtke2023 is cited as data-fusion prior art but the bibliography gives the Athey et al. surrogate-index title instead of Li and Luedtke's Efficient Estimation under Data Fusion.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The sign-boundary comparison omits closer surrogate-paradox sign-criterion papers such as VanderWeele2013 and MaYinLiuGeng2021 on criteria or sharp bounds for excluding surrogate paradoxes.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The iff condition compares an observed pre-terminal increment S1-S0 to a post-surrogate drift budget c(U_J,U_H); the proposed 'smallest cost needed to reproduce the treated increment law' is not defined by the stated drift cost.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The proof sketch does not give a concrete route for the claimed two-by-two closed-form residual endpoints; it only gestures at a generic optimal-transport calculation.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define a separate observed-date path-evolution cost for U0 to U1, or rewrite Conjecture 1 so the strictness threshold is a terminal-state transport cost actually tied to c(U_J,U_H).
Add VanderWeele2013 and MaYinLiuGeng2021 as explicit sign-boundary comparators and state precisely what noisy-panel drift adds beyond surrogate-paradox consistency criteria.
Turn Conjecture 2's tautological sign condition into the closed-form endpoint theorem: state the two 2x2 transport programs explicitly and make that the novelty-bearing claim.
Fix the LiLuedtke2023 bibliography entry title and keep it as estimation/data-fusion prior art rather than identification prior art.

recommended_next_step: Revise the drift/increment threshold and sign-boundary literature comparison before sending this to Stage 0.
